The Proposal: -
Maharashtra has more than 100 art forms of unorganized type. Most of these
Art forms are associated with folk art and tribal art. Most of these artists
Individual forms of art are performed, while in some art forms, groups also perform.
Go. Potaraj, Rairanda, Kadakalakshmi, Renu Rai, Kadam Rai, Bahurupi, Vasudeva, Chitrakala and Bhakti.
Warkari, instrumentalist, singer, kirtanist, orator, Bharudkar, Phadkari families associated with the culture.
Maharashtra has an estimated over five lakh artists in the unorganised sector from many such genres.
They lack professionalism. To preserve and promote these arts.
In view of the above, the expenses for organizing and organizing the "Festival of Unorganized Arts" are subject to
Administrative approval was granted by a government decision. Accordingly, the festival
The issue of financial sanctioning of the organizing expenses was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Organized on "Festival of Unorganized Arts" with a view to preserve and promote the arts.
The amount of expenditure shall be Rs. 20,00,000 - (Rupees Twenty Lakhs only) subject to this Government decision.
Financial approval is being given.
Director, Directorate of Cultural Affairs, Mumbai as Controller and
The Accountant, Directorate of Cultural Affairs, Mumbai has been declared as the Drawing and Disbursing Officer.
